title: Kannukulle Unnai Vaithen Lyrics Pennin Manathai Thottu
stanzas:
Kannukulle Unnai Vaithen Song Lyrics Pennin Manathai Thottu
#UnniKrishnan

kannukulle unnai
vaithen kannamma
naan kangal mooda
maattenadi sellamma
naan kangal mooda
maattenadi sellamma

adi neethaan en santhosham
poovellaam un vaasam
nee paesum pechellaam
naan ketkum sangeetham
un punnagai naan
semikindra selvam adi
nee illai endraal
naanum ingae ezhai adi

nedungaalamaai mudangaamale
enakulle nesam kidankindrathe
unai paarthathum uyir thoondave
uthadugal thaandi therikindrathe

tharithaana yen nenjil
vizhunthaaye vithaiyaaga
nee anbaai paarkum paarvayile
en jeevan vaazhuthadi

kannukulle unnai
vaithen kannamma
naan kangal mooda
maattenadi adi sellamma
naan kangal mooda
maattenadi sellamma

mazhai megamaai
uru maarava
un vaasal vathu
 uyir thoovava

kannaaga karuthaaga
unai kaapen uyiraaga
unai kandaen kaninthen
kalanthene ada
unnul uraintheney

kannukulle unnai
vaithen kannamma
naan kangal mooda
maattenadi sellamma
naan kangal mooda
maattenadi sellamma

adi neethaan en santhosham
poovellaam un vaasam
nee paesum pechellaam
naan ketkum sangeetham
un punnagai naan
semikindra selvam adi
nee illai endraal
naanum ingae ezhai adi

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kannukulle Unnai Vaithen?

The song is a romantic melody that expresses deep love and longing.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the renowned playback singer Unnikrishnan.

Who composed the music for Pennin Manathai Thottu?

The music was composed by S.A. Rajkumar.

What is the release year of the movie Pennin Manathai Thottu?

The movie was released in the year 2000.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kannukulle Unnai Vaithen from Pennin Manathai Thottu is a beautiful romantic melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by Unnikrishnan, the song conveys the emotions of a lover who cherishes every moment with their beloved. The soothing music by S.A. Rajkumar enhances the heartfelt lyrics, making it a favorite for romantic occasions. The song evokes feelings of warmth and affection, making it perfect for moments of love and reflection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kannukulle Unnai Vaithen from the movie Pennin Manathai Thottu. Unnikrishnan's soulful voice combined with S.A. Rajkumar's soothing music creates a romantic ambiance. Dive into this timeless classic that captures the essence of love and longing.
stanzaMeanings: I have kept you in my eyes, dear. I won't close my eyes, dear.
You are my happiness. Every flower has your fragrance. Every word you speak is music to me. Your smile is my treasure. Without you, I am poor here.
For a long time, without breaking, love is inside me. Seeing you makes my life excited, and my lips tremble beyond words.
You fell into my heart like a seed, and in your loving gaze, my life flourishes.
If you lean on my shoulder, my life will be long.
I have kept you in my eyes, dear. I won't close my eyes, dear.
To become like a rain cloud and pour life at your doorstep.
To become a flower that blooms daily on your hair.
I will protect you like my eyes, I found you as my life, I tasted and mixed with you, and I live within you.
Today, you have changed something in me. I will never forget you.
I have kept you in my eyes, dear. I won't close my eyes, dear.
You are my happiness. Every flower has your fragrance. Every word you speak is music to me. Your smile is my treasure. Without you, I am poor here.
